response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and a long track record of craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, teaching). However, the role targets a Director-level IC Principal Engineer with ~15 years and deep, recognized AI expertise, including shipped AI products/platforms and cloud/AI strategy influence. The resume shows roughly 11 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, no advanced AI degree, and only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling. Seniority, AI depth, and strategic-leadership signals fall well short of the bar.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public teaching/workshops
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Experience (~11 years) below the 15-year requirement for a Principal/Director-level IC
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Limited cloud-platform strategy scope; no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving org-wide technical direction

key_factors.factor: Lacks recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Below required 15 years and Principal/Director-level scope
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot breadth
